source.name: Level 5: 1.3 Test Your Knowledge - Level 5 adds
source.instructions: **What does Level 5 add on top of Level 4?**

answers.answer: A tools folder, tools registration in endpoints.yml, and flows/actions that use tool calling
A new virtual environment inside level5
Replacement of all Level 4 actions with tools

source.guidance: Level 5 adds a tools module, registration in endpoints, and flows/actions that use tool calling; Level 4 content remains.
